mapper.sql: id, user_id, article_id, chapter_id, biz_scene, provider, model_name, request_tokens, response_tokens, total_tokens, estimated_cost_cent, actual_cost_cent, pre_auth_amount_cent, settled_amount_cent, refund_amount_cent, status, trace_id, idempotency_key, error_message, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ai_usage_billing WHERE user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY create_time DESC, id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_usage_billing ( user_id, article_id, chapter_id, biz_scene, provider, model_name, request_tokens, response_tokens, total_tokens, estimated_cost_cent, actual_cost_cent, pre_auth_amount_cent, settled_amount_cent, refund_amount_cent, status, trace_id, idempotency_key, error_message, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{articleId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{chapterId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{bizScene,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{provider,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{requestTokens,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{responseTokens,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{totalTokens,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{estimatedCostCent,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{actualCostCent,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{preAuthAmountCent,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{settledAmountCent,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{refundAmountCent,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{traceId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{idempotencyKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{errorMessage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
